narrative:
Copley Twp F (precinct in Summit County) has 1,142 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
